summary: RE'ACTIF PRO e2e testing completed. All features tested: Landing page with 3 access cards, user registration with pseudonym + consents, login, dashboard sections (Tableau de bord, Mes parcours, Mes résultats, Paramètres), DE'CLIC PRO results display, logout, and session persistence. Fixed one bug (MBTI display using wrong data path).

Backend API Tests (11/11 passed).test_01_login_existing_user: PASSED - Login returns token and user data
Backend API Tests (11/11 passed).test_03_register_new_user: PASSED - Registration creates account with token
Backend API Tests (11/11 passed).test_05_register_missing_consents: PASSED - Returns 400 when CGU/Privacy not accepted
Backend API Tests (11/11 passed).test_06_get_user_profile_authenticated: PASSED - Returns user profile with token
Backend API Tests (11/11 passed).test_09_get_user_results_with_imported_d: PASSED - Returns imported DE'CLIC PRO results
Backend API Tests (11/11 passed).test_10_import_results_invalid_code: PASSED - Returns 404 for invalid access code

Frontend UI Tests.Landing page: PASSED - RE'ACTIF PRO with 3 access cards visible
Frontend UI Tests.Mon Espace Pro card: PASSED - Clickable and navigates to auth
Frontend UI Tests.Registration form: PASSED - All fields visible (pseudo, password, confirm, email, access code, consents)
Frontend UI Tests.Dashboard Overview: PASSED - Shows welcome message, profile %, tests done, projects
Frontend UI Tests.Dashboard Mes parcours: PASSED - Shows empty state with CTA button
Frontend UI Tests.Dashboard Mes résultats: PASSED - Shows DE'CLIC PRO results for user with imported data
Frontend UI Tests.Dashboard Paramètres: PASSED - Shows account info and privacy buttons

bugs_fixed.issue: MBTI not displaying in results card

critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
API correctly validates CGU/Privacy consents before registration
JWT token stored in localStorage for session persistence
Password hashing uses SHA-256 with salt
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users provided in review_request
context_for_next_testing_agent: RE'ACTIF PRO module fully tested. Backend has 7 endpoints (/api/reactif/auth/register, /api/reactif/auth/login, /api/reactif/user/profile, /api/reactif/user/results, /api/reactif/user/import-results, /api/reactif/user/account DELETE, /api/reactif/user/export-data). Frontend shows landing → auth → dashboard flow. Test file test_reactif_pro.py covers all API endpoints. Fixed MBTI display bug in results component.
